nasb.text: So when they got out on the land, they *saw a charcoal fire already laid and fish placed on it, and bread.

esv.text: When they got out on land, they saw a charcoal fire in place, with fish laid out on it, and bread.

cnv.text: 他們上了岸，就看見那裡有一堆炭火，上面有魚有餅。

ccb.text: 他们上岸后，看见有一堆炭火，上面有鱼和饼。

csbs.text: 他们一上岸，就看见有一堆炭火，上面放着鱼，还有饼。
